resume.done_when: Existing rate-limit tests pass AND new per-route override test passes.
resume.resume_by: Add a per-route override to src/middleware/rate-limit.ts.
resume.prompt: run python3 scripts/handoff-render.py feat-rate-limit and continue. next acceptance check: rate-limit middleware accepts a per-route override.

state.next_acceptance_check: pnpm test src/middleware/rate-limit.spec.ts passes including the new test.
decisions: per-route override is opt-in via decorator
rejected_paths: token-bucket — too heavy for our use case
open_risks: Decorator stacking semantics with auth middleware unverified

files_read_first.why: primary edit target for per-route override
